subcodes.title: Fi’l-Maut va’l-‘Ama’
subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He in Whose Hands lie the kingdoms of the heavens and of the earth. There is no God but Him, the One, the All-Compelling, the Single, the All-Powerful... As to the meaning of that other tradition mentioned in the Book, that God was in a cloud with air above it and air beneath it [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بسم الله الرحمن الرحیم. سبحان الذی بیده ملکوت السموات و الارض لا اله الا هو الواحد المتکبر الاحد المقتدر ... اما معنی الحديث الآخر الذی سئل فی الکتاب ان الله کان فی عماء فوقه هواء و تحته هواء
subcodes.subjects: @the cloud ['ama], @transcendence; unknowability of God, @absolute freedom; independence of God
